items.title_en: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
items.title_zh: 欧洲遭遇热浪高峰，法国溺水死亡人数激增
items.desc_en: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.
items.desc_zh: 法国总理塞巴斯蒂安·勒科尔努表示，自上周四以来，法国已有 40 人因热浪而溺水身亡。

items.title_en: Oracle sheds 21,000 roles over the past year amid wave of AI layoffs from tech giants
items.title_zh: 科技巨头人工智能裁员浪潮中，甲骨文去年裁员 21,000 人
items.desc_en: "The adoption and deployment of AI technologies across our operations have resulted, and may continue to result, in reductions to our workforce," Oracle said.
items.desc_zh: 甲骨文表示：“在我们的运营中采用和部署人工智能技术已经并可能继续导致我们的员工人数减少。”

items.title_en: Buy IBM as investors underappreciate the strength of its software business, says JPMorgan
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，由于投资者低估了 IBM 软件业务的实力，因此买入 IBM
items.desc_en: The investment bank upgraded the legacy tech name to overweight from neutral.
items.desc_zh: 该投行将这家传统科技公司的评级从中性上调至增持。

items.title_en: Trump anticipates better relationship with Colombia under new leader
items.title_zh: 特朗普预计新领导人领导下与哥伦比亚关系会更好
items.desc_en: Abelardo de la Espriella, who preliminary results suggest is Colombia's next president, had Trump's endorsement.
items.desc_zh: 初步结果显示，阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉将成为哥伦比亚下一任总统，他得到了特朗普的支持。

items.title_en: Five things to watch in Tuesday's primaries as New York races take center stage
items.title_zh: 随着纽约竞选成为焦点，周二初选有五件事值得关注
items.desc_en: Tuesday’s primaries in New York, Maryland and Utah test outside money, party power and the influence of Zohran Mamdani and Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 周二在纽约、马里兰州和犹他州举行的初选将考验外部资金、政党权力以及佐兰·马姆达尼和唐纳德·特朗普的影响力。

items.title_en: AI groups spend $20 million going head-to-head in New York race pitting Bores, Lasher, Schlossberg
items.title_zh: 人工智能团体花费 2000 万美元在纽约比赛中与 Bores、Lasher 和 Schlossberg 进行正面交锋
items.desc_en: Companies are spending big to shape AI policies at the federal level. And the Manhattan House Democratic primary will be a test of where voters stand.
items.desc_zh: 公司正在投入巨资制定联邦层面的人工智能政策。曼哈顿众议院民主党初选将考验选民的立场。

items.title_en: U.S. fights with Brazil for China's giant soybean market
items.title_zh: 美国与巴西争夺中国巨大大豆市场
items.desc_en: The U.S. Soybean Export Council makes claims to higher quality a selling point over Brazil's crop, as American farmers attempt to win back business from the world's largest importer
items.desc_zh: 美国大豆出口委员会声称更高质量是巴西作物的卖点，因为美国农民试图从世界最大进口国手中夺回业务

items.title_en: How Europe is grappling with extreme heat as red alerts issued in Britain, France, Spain and Italy
items.title_zh: 英国、法国、西班牙和意大利发布红色警报，欧洲如何应对极端高温
items.desc_en: Several European countries issued red weather alerts as a fresh bout of extreme heat pushed temperatures beyond 40 degrees Celsius (104 degrees Fahrenheit).
items.desc_zh: 由于新一轮极端高温使气温超过 40 摄氏度（104 华氏度），一些欧洲国家发布了红色天气警报。

items.title_en: Tech rout intensifies as selloff grips global stocks
items.title_zh: 全球股市遭遇抛售，科技股跌势加剧
items.desc_en: Global stocks sold off on Tuesday, led by deep losses for tech stocks following a losing session for the sector on Wall Street.
items.desc_zh: 周二，全球股市遭遇抛售，其中科技股在华尔街股市下跌后大幅下跌。

items.title_en: How a $4 billion Indian startup won Meta's backing but lost its founder to WhatsApp
items.title_zh: 一家价值 40 亿美元的印度初创公司如何赢得 Meta 的支持，但却将创始人输给了 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Indian fintech startup Cred will raise $900 million in a round led by Meta, but has lost its founder and CEO to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: 印度金融科技初创公司 Cred 将在 Meta 领投的一轮融资中筹集 9 亿美元，但其创始人兼首席执行官已被 WhatsApp 取代。

items.title_en: Zohran Mamdani’s influence over Democrats put to the test, and other things to watch in Tuesday’s elections - CNN
items.title_zh: 佐兰·马姆达尼 (Zohran Mamdani) 对民主党的影响力以及周二选举中值得关注的其他事项将受到考验 - CNN
items.desc_en: Zohran Mamdani’s influence over Democrats put to the test, and other things to watch in Tuesday’s elections  CNNNew Yorkers vote as Democrats weigh competing visions in era of Trump  The GuardianElect
items.desc_zh: 佐兰·马姆达尼 (Zohran Mamdani) 对民主党的影响力受到考验，以及周二选举中值得关注的其他事项 CNN 纽约人投票，民主党人权衡特朗普时代的相互竞争的愿景

items.title_en: Apollo curbs withdrawals after exit requests hit 17%, reigniting fears over private credit liquidity
items.title_zh: Apollo 在退出请求达到 17% 后限制提款，重新引发对私人信贷流动性的担忧
items.desc_en: Apollo is capping investor redemptions in its main retail-focused private credit fund after exit requests hit 17%.
items.desc_zh: 在退出请求达到 17% 后，Apollo 正在限制其主要零售私人信贷基金的投资者赎回。

items.title_en: Montreal shooting leaves officer, civilian and suspect dead
items.title_zh: 蒙特利尔枪击事件造成警官、平民和嫌疑人死亡
items.desc_en: It was the first time in 24 years that a Montreal police officer was  killed in the line of duty, the city's police chief said.
items.desc_zh: 蒙特利尔市警察局长表示，这是 24 年来首次有一名警察在执行任务时被杀。

items.title_en: Ransom note claims Nancy Guthrie died after abduction
items.title_zh: 勒索信声称南希·格思里在绑架后死亡
items.desc_en: The note from the possible kidnappers reportedly stated that they did not mean for her to die and included an apology to the family.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，可能的绑架者在信中表示，他们并不是故意要她死，并向家人道歉。

items.desc_en: The U.S. issued a sweeping rollback of sanctions on Iranian oil, offering Tehran an economic lifeline as negotiations toward a peace deal proceed.

items.title_en: Dettol apologises after ad to clean up 'toxic men' backfires in China
items.title_zh: 滴露清理“毒男”广告在中国适得其反后道歉
items.desc_en: The ad sparked accusations of sexism in China, after featuring a man looking for a partner who is "not tainted by other men".
items.desc_zh: 这则广告在中国引发了性别歧视的指责，广告中一名男子正在寻找“不受其他男人玷污”的伴侣。

items.title_en: Red heat alerts issued in France, Italy and Spain as 40C temperatures forecast
items.title_zh: 法国、意大利和西班牙发布高温警报，预计气温将达到 40 摄氏度
items.desc_en: The heatwave conditions are forecast to intensify in the coming days across central and western Europe.
items.desc_zh: 预计未来几天中欧和西欧的热浪天气将加剧。

items.title_en: Kenya minister found in contempt of court over US-backed Ebola centre
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚部长因美国支持的埃博拉中心而被判藐视法庭
items.desc_en: Aden Duale defied a High Court order to stop building work on a controversial US-funded facility.
items.desc_zh: 亚丁·杜阿勒 (Aden Duale) 藐视高等法院停止建设一处有争议的美国资助设施的命令。

items.title_en: WhatsApp to be led by Indian start-up founder as Will Cathcart steps back
items.title_zh: Will Cathcart 退出后 WhatsApp 将由印度初创公司创始人领导
items.desc_en: WhatsApp's leadership shake-up comes as Meta looks to strengthen its app's already booming presence in India.
items.desc_zh: WhatsApp 领导层变动之际，Meta 希望加强其应用程序在印度已经蓬勃发展的影响力。

items.title_en: Lucid to lay off roughly 18% of U.S. workforce, COO Marc Winterhoff leaves
items.title_zh: 首席运营官马克·温特霍夫 (Marc Winterhoff) 离职，Lucid 将裁员约 18% 的美国员工
items.desc_en: Lucid Group is cutting its U.S. workforce by 18% as part of a cost-savings plan. It also said COO Marc Winterhoff is departing effective immediately.
items.desc_zh: 作为成本节约计划的一部分，Lucid Group 将在美国裁员 18%。它还表示，首席运营官马克·温特霍夫(Marc Winterhoff)将立即离职。

items.title_en: Myanmar army killed over 700 civilians in six months, UN says
items.title_zh: 联合国称缅甸军队在六个月内杀害了700多名平民
items.desc_en: The new UN report says the 702 civilian deaths over six months last year included 153 children.
items.desc_zh: 联合国新报告称，去年六个月内有 702 名平民死亡，其中包括 153 名儿童。

items.title_en: At least 13 killed and dozens injured after Qatar gas explosion
items.title_zh: 卡塔尔天然气爆炸至少13人死亡、数十人受伤
items.desc_en: The city's main liquified natural gas (LNG) processing site suffered a "technical accident" in the Ras Laffan industrial zone.
items.desc_zh: 该市主要液化天然气（LNG）加工基地位于拉斯拉凡工业区遭遇“技术事故”。

items.title_en: Largest ever cocaine bust in Australia after police raid underground bunker
items.title_zh: 警方突袭地下掩体后，澳大利亚破获有史以来最大规模的可卡因
items.desc_en: Police seized 2.7 tonnes of cocaine worth an estimated A$816m after searching a property in western Sydney.
items.desc_zh: 警方在搜查悉尼西部的一处房产后，查获了 2.7 吨可卡因，价值估计 8.16 亿澳元。

items.title_en: Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯军队集结威胁被视为夺取乌克兰顿巴斯关键的城市
items.desc_en: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.
items.desc_zh: 如果科斯特扬季尼夫卡陷落，俄罗斯军队将能够向乌克兰东部仅存的最后据点推进。

items.title_en: It's not just about nudity warns actress - the complex reality of images and online abuse
items.title_zh: 女演员警告说，这不仅仅是裸体问题 - 图像和网络虐待的复杂现实
items.desc_en: Tech companies and authorities are failing women by focusing on nudity rather than consent, says a report by Chayn.
items.desc_zh: 查恩的一份报告称，科技公司和当局关注裸体而不是同意，从而辜负了女性的期望。

items.title_en: Why an AI company cleaned my New York City apartment for free
items.title_zh: 为什么人工智能公司免费清洁我的纽约公寓
items.desc_en: An AI company is sending free cleaners door-to-door in a bid to train the robots it hopes one day will replace them.
items.desc_zh: 一家人工智能公司正在派免费清洁工挨家挨户培训机器人，希望有一天能够取代他们。

items.title_en: How the social media ban could reshape how all of us use the internet
items.title_zh: 社交媒体禁令如何重塑我们所有人使用互联网的方式
items.desc_en: Why some argue the social media ban could have a profound affect on how young people gain new knowledge and the rest of us move around online
items.desc_zh: 为什么有些人认为社交媒体禁令可能会对年轻人获取新知识以及我们其他人在网上活动的方式产生深远影响

items.title_zh: 新视频游戏机旨在让孩子们动起来

items.desc_zh: Nex Playground 将于 6 月 22 日在英国和爱尔兰发售，售价为 269 英镑（319 欧元）。

items.title_en: UK's top data and AI regulator quits after 'inappropriate' humour
items.title_zh: 英国最高数据和人工智能监管机构因“不当”幽默而辞职
items.desc_en: Edwards has been the boss of the data watchdog since January 2022, and said he had made inappropriate attempts at humour.
items.desc_zh: 爱德华兹自 2022 年 1 月起一直担任数据监管机构的老板，并表示他在幽默方面做出了不恰当的尝试。

items.title_zh: GTA 6 - 关于 Rockstar 的热门游戏您需要了解的一切

items.desc_zh: Rockstar 系列的第六款游戏将成为今年发行量最大的游戏。

items.title_en: The artificial ice pyramids saving India's mountain villages
items.title_zh: 人造冰金字塔拯救了印度的山村
items.desc_en: Himalayan villages are creating artificial glaciers to guarantee water for their crops in the spring.
items.desc_zh: 喜马拉雅山的村庄正在建造人工冰川，以保证春季农作物的用水。

items.title_zh: Rockstar 公布《GTA 6》预购日期和封面艺术

items.desc_zh: 开发商表示，这款备受期待的游戏将于 6 月 25 日开始预售。

items.title_zh: 亚马逊创始人贝佐斯表示，人工智能将为人类创造更多就业机会，而不是取代他们
items.desc_en: The Amazon founder, who now has robotics and space travel companies, thinks AI will create a labour shortage.
items.desc_zh: 这位亚马逊创始人现在拥有机器人和太空旅行公司，他认为人工智能将造成劳动力短缺。
